title: Split compiler.rs (2364 lines) into sub-modules
purpose: compiler.rs is 2364 lines — well over the 500-line limit. The file contains typed AOT lowering, helper declaration boilerplate, and opcode dispatch all in one module. Splitting by responsibility improves navigability, reduces merge conflicts, and aligns with the project's file size constraints.
task: Split crates/beamr/src/jit/compiler.rs into sub-modules under crates/beamr/src/jit/compiler/. Extract typed AOT lowering into ir_typed.rs, helper declarations into ir_helpers.rs, and if needed extract non-typed dispatch arms into dispatch.rs. The remaining compiler.rs core must be under 500 lines. All public API is re-exported through the compiler module.

requirements.title: Extract typed AOT lowering into compiler/ir_typed.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract typed AOT lowering functions (lower_typed_int_arithmetic, lower_typed_type_test, lower_typed_test_arity, typed_guard_decision, TypedRegisterState, supported_type, float_fail_block, and related typed dispatch logic) into crates/beamr/src/jit/compiler/ir_typed.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change the function signatures or behavior of any extracted function.
acceptance: compiler/ir_typed.rs contains typed_guard_decision, TypedRegisterState, supported_type, float_fail_block
All extracted functions have identical signatures to their pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr passes with typed AOT lowering in new location

requirements.title: Extract helper declarations into compiler/ir_helpers.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract helper declaration functions (declare_binary_helpers, declare_message_helpers, declare_closure_helpers, declare_add_frame_helper, declare_unary_helper, declare_void_unary_helper, and related declaration boilerplate) into crates/beamr/src/jit/compiler/ir_helpers.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change the function signatures or behavior of any extracted function.
acceptance: All extracted functions have identical signatures to their pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr passes with helper declarations in new location

requirements.title: Extract non-typed compile dispatch if needed for 500-line target
requirements.spec: IF compiler.rs remains over 500 lines after R1 and R2 extractions, THE SYSTEM SHALL extract non-typed compile dispatch arms (the match instruction arms for binary, closure, message, float, and map opcodes) into crates/beamr/src/jit/compiler/dispatch.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change match arm behavior or ordering.
acceptance: IF dispatch.rs is created, it contains the match arms for binary, closure, message, float, and map opcodes
compiler.rs is under 500 lines after all extractions
Test: cargo test -p beamr passes with dispatch logic in new location

requirements.title: All files under 500-line limit
requirements.spec: WHEN the split is complete, compiler.rs (the remaining core) SHALL be under 500 lines. Each extracted file (ir_typed.rs, ir_helpers.rs, dispatch.rs if created) SHALL be under 500 lines. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT introduce any file over 500 lines as part of this refactor.
acceptance: IF compiler/dispatch.rs exists THEN wc -l compiler/dispatch.rs < 500

requirements.title: SHALL NOT change public API — re-export via compiler module
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL re-export all previously-public items from the compiler module so that no downstream use site needs to change import paths. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any public type signature, function signature, or trait implementation. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change the compiler module's public surface as observed by other crates or modules.
acceptance: All items that were pub in compiler.rs remain accessible via their original paths
No other file in the codebase needs import path changes
cargo check --workspace passes without modification to any file outside the compiler module

boundaries: SHALL NOT change any public API — all changes are internal module restructuring
SHALL NOT change function behavior, only file location
SHALL NOT rename any function or type as part of the split
SHALL NOT modify compiler_tests.rs beyond updating use/mod paths if needed
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
Each extracted sub-module is under 500 lines
No import path changes required outside the compiler module
